name: Spiced Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugars.
2. Add the egg to the mixture.
3. Sift in the dry ingredients, alternating with milk until combined.
4. Fold in the apple sauce and add cinnamon.
5. Fill greased muffin cups 3/4 full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20-25 minutes.
7. Cool before serving.
